description:
A cross-platform, multi-language package manager and workflow tool


[0.71.2] - 2026-06-29
✨ Highlights
This release features a couple of important bug fixes.
Fixed
- Handle CONDA_OVERRIDE_* in pixi global install by @hunger in #6335
- Convert custom-scheme channel URLs to https by @hunger in #6456
- Preserve declared platforms for manifests without system-requirements by @hunger in #6458
- Fix conda-pypi-mapping internet access in offline tests by @mgorny in #6438
